purpose: Block technically valid but bland or too-literal recipe products before final human review.
plain_english: The recipe must feel like something Luke would actually cook, not just the shortest possible interpretation of the ingredients.

core_rules.summary: Do not send a plain proof-only recipe to Luke review unless the brief explicitly asks for plain food.
Most savoury recipes need salt and/or pepper unless there is a saved reason not to use them.
Toast-based breakfast recipes need butter or another deliberate finish unless the brief says dry toast.
Butter, seasoning, herbs, acid, sauce, or finish must be present in blueprint and datasheet before appearing in the card.

must_not_fake: Do not add butter or seasoning to the visible card unless rows exist in blueprint and datasheet.
Do not approve the plain version just because the technical data passes.

blocks_review_if: savoury recipe has no seasoning and no saved reason
toast breakfast has no butter/fat/finish and no saved reason
recipe description contains plain/simple because the build skipped flavour design
chef edge is added only in visible prose without datasheet rows
